1012 Dermatology Drive

Rx
Date: 21/01/2024
Patient: Amanda Foster  DOB: 02/03/1995

1. Tretinoin 0.025% cream 45g tube
   Sig: Apply a pea-sized amount to face at bedtime.
   Use sunscreen SPF 30+ during the day.
   Disp: 1 tube
   Refills: 3

2. Clindamycin 1% gel 30g
   Sig: Apply thin layer to affected areas every morning.
   Disp: 1 tube
   Refills: 3

3. Benzoyl Peroxide 5% wash 170mL
   Sig: Use as face wash, lather and leave on 2 minutes, rinse.
   Once daily in the morning.
   Disp: 1 bottle
   Refills: 3

Diagnosis: Acne vulgaris, moderate

Dr. Lisa Park, MD, FAAD
